hero.title: Eco Habit Tracker
hero.description: Build eco-friendly habits, track daily progress, and maintain streaks in your browser.

differences.title: Build sustainable routines one day at a time
differences.description: Eco Habit Tracker keeps practical habit suggestions, today’s progress, and a current streak together.

items.title: Plan
items.description: Choose practical eco-friendly habits that fit everyday routines.

items.title: Track
items.description: Mark completed habits for today and undo them when needed.

items.title: Complete
items.description: Build a current streak by completing at least one habit each day.

feel.title: A direct path from intention to daily action
feel.description: The tracker keeps eco habits, filters, today’s progress, and the current streak visible.

items.title: Choose useful habits
items.description: Browse practical suggestions across five eco-friendly categories.

items.title: Track today
items.description: Complete or undo habits as the day progresses.

items.title: Build consistency
items.description: Maintain a streak by completing at least one habit each day.

audiences.title: Who uses Eco Habit Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for anyone building consistent eco-friendly routines.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Turn practical sustainable choices into daily habits.

items.title: Families
items.description: Keep simple household eco actions visible and repeatable.

items.title: Students
items.description: Build environmental awareness through everyday action.

resourceSection.title: Eco habit tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to plan, track, and complete daily eco habits.

items.title: Bundled habits
items.description: Start with 10 practical habits across five categories.

items.title: Daily progress
items.description: Store today’s completed habit IDs in this browser.

items.title: Current streak
items.description: Count consecutive days with at least one completed habit.

groupedSection.title: Plan and complete eco habits
groupedSection.description: Use one browser-only workflow for daily progress and consistency.

items.name: Search and filter
items.description: Find habits by title, description, or category.

items.name: Daily completion
items.description: Complete or undo habits for today.

items.name: Browser streak
items.description: Track consecutive days with local date-based progress.

technicalSection.title: Designed for browser habit tracking
technicalSection.description: Eco Habit Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa browser-first reference architecture.
items: Date-based browser progress with local streak calculation.

finalCta.title: Track eco habits every day
finalCta.description: Open Eco Habit Tracker to build simple habits and track progress in your browser.
